SOLIDITY_PRAGMAS_VERSION
Severity: 1

name: use-ownable2step
text: By demanding that the receiver of the owner permissions actively accept via a contract call of its own,  `Ownable2Step` and `Ownable2StepUpgradeable` prevent the contract ownership from accidentally being transferred  to an address that cannot handle it.

name: array-length-outside-loop
text: Caching the array length outside a loop saves reading it on each iteration, as long as the array's length is not changed during the loop.

name: unnecessary-checked-arithmetic-in-loop
text: A lot of times there is no risk that the loop counter can overflow.  Using Solidity's unchecked block saves the overflow checks.

name: use-prefix-increment-not-postfix
text: Consider using the prefix increment expression whenever the return value is not needed. The prefix increment expression is cheaper in terms of gas.

name: naming-convention
text: Function CondoVotingSystem.CLOCK_MODE() (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#5517-5519) is not in mixedCase

name: use-custom-error-not-require
text: Consider using custom errors as they are more gas efficient while allowing developers  to describe the error in detail using NatSpec.

name: inefficient-state-variable-increment
text: <x> += <y> costs more gas than <x> = <x> + <y> for state variables.

name: timestamp
text:
CondoVotingSystem.cancelProposal(uint256) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#5561-5574) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(msg.sender == p.proposer,Not proposer) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#5566)
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(p.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(UnderDeliberation)),Cannot cancel) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#5567-5571)

name: shadowing-local
text:

	- ERC20.approve(address,uint256) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#4990-4994) (function)
	- IERC20.approve(address,uint256) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#4828) (function)

name: timestamp
text:
CondoVotingSystem.endVote(uint256) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#5653-5684) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(p.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(Voting)),Not voting) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#5657-5660)
	- timeoutReached = balanceOf(msg.sender) > 0 && (clock() - p.voteStart) > voteTimeout (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#5662-5664)
	- require(bool,string)(timeoutReached || quorumReached,Cannot end vote yet) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#5675)
